title: Navigation History, Immutable Snapshots, Back, and Bounded Undo · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts History Capacity
summary: History stores mutable references, pushes attempts before success, back triggers new hidden network work, unlimited pages accumulate, and undo can resurrect a stale pending request. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts history capacity increment in bounded immutable navigation timeline. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Bound history by entries or bytes and define eviction, collection interaction, and persistence behavior visibly.
Push only after success, restore without hidden traffic when promised, and cancel or supersede pending operations safely.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
